special_mechanics.name: Swimming
special_mechanics.description: Mr. Nutz can swim in some levels

special_mechanics.name: Tail Strike
special_mechanics.description: Character can strike enemies with his tail

special_mechanics.name: Nut Throwing
special_mechanics.description: Can collect nuts as ammunition and throw them at enemies

special_mechanics.name: Enemy Jumping
special_mechanics.description: Character can jump on most enemies to defeat them

tier_notes: Tier 3: Empirical/qualitative data only. No precise physics parameters documented in available sources. Game features standard platformer mechanics (running, jumping, swimming) but specific velocity, acceleration, and gravity values are not provided in public documentation.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor (Mr. Nutz SNES article)
